title: LlmJudge Lambda Response
description: Success response from the LLM-as-a-Judge Lambda. criterion_scores lists numeric scores only for criteria with assessability "assessed".

overall_score.description: Weighted average score across all criteria. Present only in single-call evaluation; omitted in parallel (per-criterion) mode where no aggregation is applied.

criterion_scores.description: Per-criterion scores (1–5) keyed by criterion name. Keys appear only for criteria with criterion_assessability "assessed"; may be empty if none were assessed.

criterion_reasoning.description: Per-criterion reasoning keyed by criterion name. When evaluation_steps are defined, each value may include numbered step answers followed by a final summary.

criterion_assessability.description: Per-criterion machine-readable assessability: assessed or not_assessable.

reasoning.description: Overall evaluation summary (e.g. Japanese 総評) from the judge LLM

judge_model.description: The model name used as judge

examples.reasoning: The response demonstrates strong factual accuracy and is clearly written...
